description: Crypto payment processing SDK using the NASPIP protocol. 3 endpoints + 1 webhook.
rules: Always authenticate first with POST /auth/token before any other API call
Every request needs TWO headers: Authorization (Bearer token) and x-fluxis-api-key
Payment requests are created under a Point of Sale, not directly
The NASPIP token in the payment response is what you render as QR code
Use webhooks as primary notification, polling only for reconciliation
